message:
feat(wal): add lock-free per-thread WAL buffer infrastructure (D1)

Implements the foundational infrastructure for replacing the global WAL
append mutex with per-thread log buffers and epoch-based group commit
(Silo/Aether pattern from SOSP 2013).

Key changes:
- Make per_core_buffer.rs production code (was test-only)
- Add thread-local slot mapping via AtomicUsize + thread_local!
- Create parallel_wal.rs with ParallelWalCoordinator wrapper
- Add global coordinator registry for per-database coordinators
- Export all types via fsqlite-wal lib.rs

Thread slot assignment uses the same pattern as existing
PUBLISHED_COUNTER_STRIPE_INDEX for consistency.

Pager integration (D1.3-D1.4) is blocked by concurrent D2 work
(ShardedPageCache compilation errors). Background epoch ticker,
segment file I/O, and recovery updates to follow.

Epic: bd-3wop3 (Eliminate 8-16 Thread Contention)
Bead: bd-3wop3.1 (Per-thread WAL buffers + epoch group commit)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
